# copick setup mcp-remove

*Remove Copick MCP server configuration.*

## Usage

```bash
copick setup mcp-remove [OPTIONS]
```

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--target` | choice (desktop \| code-global \| code-project) | `desktop` | Target application to remove server from |
| `--project-path` | directory | — | Project path for code-project target (defaults to current directory) |
| `--server-name` | text | **required** | Name of the MCP server to remove |
| `--force` | boolean flag | `False` | Force removal without confirmation |
